internal_findings: Stage 1 installed a raw JSONL trace/span ledger and mb trace preview command.
Existing boot, authority reconciliation, export, eval, security, filesystem, and operator-surface receipts are distributed across multiple directories.
The visual tracker can show status, but it lacks a normalized causal execution model for receipts, validators, handoffs, and blockers.
Security, eval, CDR, export, and recovery replay all benefit from a common trace/provenance substrate.
decision: Implement Stage 2 as a canonical event schema plus boot-artifact ingestion that regenerates a compact index and causal graph from existing OS artifacts.
smallest_valid_change: Add canonical event and causal graph schemas.
Add an ingestion script that scans bounded receipt/handoff/boot/roadmap evidence.
Add a validator that proves JSONL integrity, schema references, parent link validity, provenance fields, and derivative index consistency.
Write the generated ledger, index, graph, validation report, receipt, handoff, and tracker preview.
